name: Execution with Unnecessary Privileges
description: The product performs operations at a privilege level higher than the minimum required, so that if a vulnerability is exploited the attacker gains those unnecessary elevated privileges, amplifying the impact.
detection_pattern: An AUTH node grants elevated privileges (root, admin, SYSTEM) to a process or context that flows through TRANSFORM or EXTERNAL nodes performing operations that do not require those privileges, without a CONTROL node that drops or restricts privileges after the privileged operation completes
